summaries.title: PM2 v7 env_file directive does not load .env — env vars must be in env block
summaries.summary: In PM2 v7, the `env_file` directive does not load `.env` file contents into the process environment; all environment variables must be specified directly in the `env` block of `ecosystem.config.js`. Additionally, `pm2 restart` reuses the old environment, so to apply new env vars, you must use `pm2 delete` followed by `pm2 start`.
